description_long: This object is a stylized representation of a corded phone, featuring a prominent diagonal bar flanked by two circular elements. The diagonal bar, likely representing the handset or the main body, is solid and has a smooth, glossy finish. The two circular shapes at either end resemble the earpiece and mouthpiece, both appearing as thick, toroidal rings. The entire object is rendered in a uniform gray color, with no visible buttons, dials, or coiled cord. The surfaces are hard and highly reflective, suggesting a plastic or metal construction. The design is minimalistic, lacking detailed features such as a keypad, rotary dial, or cradle.
description: A minimalistic, glossy gray corded phone with a diagonal bar and two thick circular ends, lacking detailed features or visible controls.
description_view_0: A side view showing the thickness of the diagonal bar and the circular profile of one end.
description_view_1: An angled top-down view revealing the full diagonal bar and both circular ends, emphasizing the object's geometric simplicity.
description_view_2: A direct side view highlighting the bar's width and the alignment of the two circular ends.
description_view_3: Another angled view similar to view 1, showing the diagonal bar and both circular ends from a different perspective.
